steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that once internal batteries stop working, the devices become ______ and are typically thrown away. The blank must describe what happens to a device that can no longer function — the answer should follow directly from the batteries ceasing to work.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — useless: A device whose battery cannot be replaced and has stopped working cannot perform its function — it is useless. This follows directly from the passage. ✓
  • Choice B — valuable: Contradicts the passage. Something thrown away as waste is not valuable. ✗
  • Choice C — familiar: Irrelevant. Whether a device is familiar to users has nothing to do with its battery failing. ✗
  • Choice D — attractive: Irrelevant. A dead battery does not affect a device's appearance, and attractiveness would not cause something to be discarded. ✗
A is correct.
